item.title: About
item.description: I’m currently in my 2nd semester. I’m mostly interested in Physics and Mathematics, as is usual here at IISER-K. No surprises here. Aside from academics, I love tinkering with electronics, (trying) to play my guitar, programming, and quizzing. I love listening to music, and I will listen to anything obscure enough to make me feel like a special snowflake. I use Linux (surprisingly, not Arch, btw) as my daily driver, and I go around evangelising it.

item.title: Get Started!
item.description: A collection of online (and offline) resources that, in my opinion, are ideal for anyone who wishes to start tinkering. The list is continually being updated as I encounter good resources out in the wild.
